recent_adjustments: Generate a procedural list of Quill‑strokes: each stroke auto‑creates a ‘memory‑token’ that is removed from the character’s memory pool.
When the Quill writes a world‑changing clause, auto‑apply the 'lattice fissure reaction' rule: spawn a ‘living‑ink echo‑phage’ entity with stats derived from the magnitude of the change.
Tie the new Glass of Memory’s ‘bound signatures’ to the Quill: after each major scene, auto‑append a glyph to the Glass reflecting the sacrificed memory.
Flag the book as the start of a new 3‑volume cycle so downstream generators know to seed Volume 2 with intensified memory‑fracture motifs.
